    • FAQs

      Questions you may have, answered with
      • What are the camera specs of the Google Pixel 6a?
        The Google Pixel 6a features a dual-camera system on the back, including a 12.2 MP main sensor and a 12 MP ultrawide sensor. It also has an 8 MP front camera. These cameras are known for advanced photo processing, including features like Night Sight for low-light conditions and Real Tone for accurate skin tones.
        How'd we do?
        Leave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tabLeave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tab
      • How does the Tensor chip affect Pixel 6a performance?
        The Google Pixel 6a is powered by Google's custom Tensor chip, which enhances the phone's ability to handle AI and machine learning tasks. This results in better overall performance in areas like speech recognition, photography enhancements, and real-time translation compared to other smartphones.
        How'd we do?
        Leave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tabLeave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tab
      • What battery features does the Pixel 6a offer?
        The Pixel 6a comes with a 4410 mAh battery that supports fast charging. It's designed to adapt to your usage patterns to reduce power consumption. The battery life can comfortably last a full day with moderate use, and the fast charging feature allows for quick power-ups.
        How'd we do?
        Leave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tabLeave feedback about your eBay search experience - opens in new window or tab
